message:
refactor(wasm): extract SIMD search module

Phase 3 of wasm.zig refactoring:

- simd_search.zig: SIMD-optimized vector operations (387 lines)
  - Vec4 type (4 x f32 SIMD vector)
  - simdDotProduct, simdNormSquared helpers
  - 6 exports: simdCosineSimilarityNormalized, simdCosineSimilarity,
    batchCosineSimilarity, vectorSearchTopK, vectorSearchBuffer, mergeTopK
  - findTopK helper for top-k selection
  - 6 unit tests for SIMD operations

- Made ColumnBuffer and getColumnBuffer public for simd_search to use
- Kept Vec4 in wasm.zig (shared by CLIP and MiniLM models)

WASM binary size: 188KB (unchanged).
